goal: User settings scaffold (non-checked-in). Local ~/.claude/gad-user.json (or .planning/.gad-user.json per-repo, decide per 63-01 audit). Fields: displayName (default = os.userInfo().username), lastActiveProjectid, assignedSouls {projectid: soulslug}, lastSessionId, preferredRuntime, teachingSnoozeUntil. Gitignored. Read by gad startup, gad snapshot, SessionStart hook, and anywhere we need to know 'who is logged in'. Addresses 2026-04-18 user feedback: 'we should have user settings that dont get checked in so we know who is logged in. if they dont have a name, default to machine name. users can have souls assigned to them in the gad project for that to be injected.'
